name: Underhanded Blow
timing: Play at the start of a Melee Attack action, before Melee Cards are drawn.
description:
Treat all 0 Dmg results on your Melee Cards as 0 Dmg instead during this round of melee.

You may choose to treat your Dmg as any type of Dmg (Impact, Slicing, Piercing or Magical) during this round of melee.
